The WIC CARD!! Easier, Faster, Safer!
Participating in WIC is now better than ever!!
Pod
June 16, 2017
The California Department of Public Health/WIC Division
 (CDPH/WIC) is excited to introduce the California WIC Card. The
 WIC Card replaced the paper food checks AND provide an easier way
 to issue food benefits and improve the shopping experience for
 WIC families and grocers.
